name: Rajshree Sugars and Chemicals Limited
summary: Rajshree Sugars and Chemicals Limited engages in the sugar, power, distillery, and biotechnology businesses in India. It provides white crystal sugar, demerara sugar, white sugar sachets, and demerara sugar sachets. The company also offers distillery products, such as rectified spirit, anhydrous alcohol, and extra neutral alcohol; and organic manure. In addition, it generates power through cogeneration plants. The company was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Coimbatore, India.
